story_title: 全站導覽 Header 與個人資料編輯模式
current_task: [FRONTEND] 建立全站導覽 Header 元件:首頁/個人資訊/場地產生器連結 + 登入登出狀態(復用現有 AuthNav 登入狀態偵測邏輯),掛載到 RootLayout 讓所有頁面共用
notes: New story: 全站導覽 Header 與個人資料編輯模式. Task 1 of 2 implemented: global Header component (首頁/個人資訊/場地規劃 links + login/logout state), mounted in RootLayout. Created src/lib/useAuthStatus.ts (extracted from AuthNav.tsx) and src/components/Header.tsx; deleted src/components/AuthNav.tsx (zero remaining references confirmed via grep); updated layout.tsx, page.tsx, and the Playwright page-object layer (new HeaderPage.ts, trimmed HomePage.ts, updated membership-task7-task9.spec.ts, new site-header.spec.ts). Deviation from architect plan flagged and fixed: since Header now persists across client-side navigation (mounted once in RootLayout instead of remounting per page visit like AuthNav did), useAuthStatus's detection effect needed to depend on usePathname() so login's router.push('/') soft-navigation is actually observed — otherwise the header stayed stuck in the logged-out state after login. Full Playwright suite (68 tests: site-header.spec.ts + membership-task7-task9.spec.ts + all venue-*.spec.ts) passes with zero regressions, confirming the flagged viewport/coordinate risk on /venue did not materialize. lint/tsc/build all clean. Ready for PR review. Task 2 (profile edit-mode toggle) touches src/app/profile/page.tsx, which currently has an always-editable nickname form (no view/edit toggle) backed by src/lib/profile-client.ts's getProfileRequest/updateNicknameRequest and src/lib/validation.ts's isValidNickname/NICKNAME_MAX_LENGTH. PR Review (iteration 1) APPROVED, 0 critical/0 should-fix/2 consider: explicitly determined this diff does NOT trigger AGENTS.md's automatic-Critical auth/session rule (proxy.ts untouched, detection semantics unchanged, only re-fetch cadence changed for UI display purposes). Independently proved the implementer's self-reported pathname-dependency bug fix is real and load-bearing by reverting it and re-running site-header.spec.ts (test failed as predicted), then restored the fix and reconfirmed pass. Confirmed the existing 'logged-in state' test already regression-covers this exact bug — no new test needed. Full regression run (68/68) re-executed independently by reviewer, not trusted from implementer report. See review-report.md for full detail. QA (iteration 1) APPROVED, 0 bugs: independent live-browser Playwright probes covering nav-loop (no flicker), two-tab session staleness, mobile 375px viewport, logout-on-/venue, same-route re-click, dual profile-links, login/register CTA coexistence -- all pass. Full 68-test suite re-run independently by QA, all green. One informational (non-blocking) finding logged and escalated to human: /venue was never added to proxy.ts's PROTECTED_PAGES (pre-existing since membership task 7, proxy.ts untouched by this diff, explicitly out of scope per orchestrator-output.md) -- Header itself correctly reflects logged-out state within ~1s of logout even on /venue, only the page's own content lacks a redirect. See qa-report.md for full detail. FINAL GATE (playwright stage): full suite re-run fresh against a clean `npm run dev` local server, all 6 spec files (site-header, membership-task7-task9, venue-plan-editor, venue-objects, venue-dimensions, venue-3d-scene) — 68/68 passed, zero regressions from the globally-mounted Header touching layout.tsx. All Clarified Acceptance Criteria cross-checked against site-header.spec.ts coverage; the one known gap (loading-skeleton assertion) was already reviewed and accepted as non-blocking. Task 1 of 2 complete; task checkbox checked in stories/site-navigation-and-profile-edit.md. Task 2 (個人資料頁編輯模式切換) not started — story not yet complete.
